default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on the new competitive content pipeline and plan the next phase.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [A new content pipeline is live, using Hyperexponential's battle cards to generate \~35 competitive articles.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [The pipeline's accuracy will be validated via two "calibration articles" before full production begins.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [A proposal for a Programmatic SEO (PSEO) pipeline is due next week, with a review meeting scheduled for the week after.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Deyan will secure updated brand guidelines from Mark to enable automated image generation, unblocking the PSEO pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)

## Topics

### New Competitive Content Pipeline

  - [**Goal:** Own competitor keywords and capture high-intent, long-tail search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [**Method:** An LLM-powered pipeline uses Hyperexponential's battle cards and a recorded SME call (Jamie, Chris, Mehmet) to create \~35 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [**Format:** Articles are either direct "vs." comparisons or neutral "landscape guides," avoiding subjective "best of" lists.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [**Validation:** Two "calibration articles" will be reviewed by Chris to validate the pipeline's accuracy before full production.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
      - ["Insurance Pricing Software Landscape" (drafted)](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
      - ["Excel Alternatives" (in progress)](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Action:** Bailey will schedule direct review sessions with Chris to accelerate feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)

### Programmatic SEO (PSEO) Pipeline

  - [**Goal:** Scale content production to a much higher volume (e.g., 500 articles/week) than editorial articles.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [**Focus:** A proposal due next week will likely focus on "pricing factors," inspired by OpenAI's resources section.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [**Technical Needs:**](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
      - [**Framer Integration:** Requires a plan to display PSEO content on the website.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
      - [**Automated Images:** Requires updated brand guidelines from Mark to enable automated image generation, which is critical for scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)

### Brand & Technical Alignment

  - [**Brand Guidelines:** The upcoming website relaunch requires new brand guidelines to ensure visual consistency. Deyan will get these from Mark.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=2162.0)
  - [**Pipeline Documentation:** GrowthX will refresh pipeline documentation to demonstrate the project's robust AI capabilities and justify the dedicated budget.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [**FAQ Schema:** Hyperexponential has the technical schema but needs help writing more and better FAQs. GrowthX will investigate if this is a service they can provide.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=2309.0)
      - [Schedule 3 direct review sessions with Chris for the calibration articles.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
      - [Deliver PSEO proposal next week.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
      - [Update Notion topic titles to reflect the "landscape guide" framing.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
      - [Resend Slack invite to David.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [Refresh pipeline documentation and share client image comps.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
      - [Investigate providing FAQ writing as a service.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [**Deyan:**](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)
      - [Secure updated brand guidelines from Mark.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)
      - [Schedule a separate, high-level session with Bailey.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=2016.0)
  - [**David:**](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=2309.0)
      - [Schedule PSEO proposal review meeting for the week after next.](https://fathom.video/share/ResUqX5Dwny66DE87HHpC-Qz8_5n_Jt_?tab=summary&timestamp=2309.0)
